title: Berislavić family of Trogir
summary:
The Berislavić family of Trogir (Croatian: Berislavići Trogirski) was a Croatian noble family whose origin is uncertain, possibly a kin to the Berislavić family of Vrh Rike rather than Berislavić family of Grabarje. 

Petar Berislavić (1475–1520), son of Ivan, was Ban of Croatia (1513-1520) and bishop of Veszprém.
text:
The Berislavić family of Trogir (Croatian: Berislavići Trogirski) was a Croatian noble family whose origin is uncertain, possibly a kin to the Berislavić family of Vrh Rike rather than Berislavić family of Grabarje. 

Petar Berislavić (1475–1520), son of Ivan, was Ban of Croatia (1513-1520) and bishop of Veszprém.
